commodities.title: Baltic Dry Index Slips to 1-Month Low
commodities.description: The Baltic Exchange’s dry bulk index, which tracks rates for vessels transporting dry commodities, dropped about 7.1% to the lowest since February 10 at 1,919 points on Tuesday, after rising nearly 3% the prior day. Ongoing disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz continued to weigh on shipping activity

commodities.title: What Can Saudi Arabia Do to Stop Oil Prices From Spiking Further?
commodities.description: Saudi Arabia was regarded for decades as the ‘global swing oil producer’, able to quickly decrease or increase its oil flows to respectively raise or lower world oil prices. commodities.title: US Crude Oil Inventories Sag As Iran War Bolsters Prices
commodities.description: The American Petroleum Institute (API) estimated that crude oil inventories in the United States fell by 1.7 million barrels in the week ending March 6, after adding 5.6 million barrels in the week prior. Analysts had expected a build of 1.4 million barrels. Inventories in the US Strategic Petroleum

commodities.title: Spot Prices Wrap: Natural Gas Slides to 16-Month Low Ahead of Cold Shot
commodities.description: Spot natural gas prices slumped broadly Tuesday as forecasts pointed to springlike temperatures holding across much of the country, even as colder weather patterns gathered strength.

commodities.title: Center for American Food Power formed to galvanize agrifood system

commodities.description: Oil prices plunged after conflicting US signals about tanker escorts through the Strait of Hormuz rattled markets.

commodities.title: Aramco CEO Warns of Oil Market Catastrophe in Prolonged War
commodities.description: Saudi Aramco's chief executive officer warned the impact on global oil markets will be 'catastrophic' the longer the disruption from the Iran war drags on.

commodities.title: Research explores method to inactivate airborne avian flu virus

commodities.title: WASDE reminder – there’s too much wheat

commodities.title: Futures Settle: Prompt Month Natural Gas Slides Even as Iran Conflict Props Up Winter Pricing
commodities.description: Natural gas futures eased Tuesday as warmer forecasts and weaker European gas prices weighed on the prompt month, while Middle East tensions continued supporting winter contracts farther out the curve.

commodities.title: GEAPS Foundation announces 2026 workforce education grants

commodities.title: MidDay Snapshot: Spot Gas Prices Slide Despite Incoming Cold Shot
commodities.description: Spot gas prices trended lower Tuesday at most major trading hubs even as a new shot of cold air was expected to arrive Wednesday to key consuming regions.
